scope: Ontogony frontend / Allagma evaluation evidence quality
primaryRepos: ontogony-ui (only if shared neutral UI components require small additions)
secondaryRepos: allagma-dotnet (backend follow-ups only unless current contracts already support fields)
nonGoals: Do not invent new backend routes in the frontend.
Do not rewrite the evaluation system.
Do not change scoring semantics unless the current repo already supports the change.
Do not make fixture/demo data appear production-authoritative.
Do not broaden scope into Kanon domain-pack polish or System topology polish.
